data.content: Foolery-only prompt hardening: added reusable execution guardrails, applied single-step authority wording to Beads/Knots prompts, wrapped terminal-manager and local-worker take/scene/poll prompts, and tightened ship follow-up prompts. Verified with bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build; bun run lint still reports 117 pre-existing warnings.
